violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. No person certified as a food safety manager was present during time of inspection. Establishment must have individuals trained in Food Safety. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (Ice Machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Establishment turned of ice machine, ice machine was placed out of order. Establishment is not to use ice machine until, photos of clean and sanitized ice machine have been provided to RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2026
The center prep unit located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. No Food safety manager was present during time of inspection. Establishment must have a person trained in Food Safety present during all times food is being prepared. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2025

Wood is used in the construction of the prep unit in the kitchen area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. - CA establishment is to put paper food liner down before constructing sandwich. Until wood is replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2025
The prep unit located in the kitchen is not in working order. Establishment has developed a plan to replaced prep unit. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2025
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrective Action - All sanitizing must be done in three bay sink until repair is made to dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, and ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was placed in three bay sink, ice machine contents were emptied during time of inspection. Ice machine is not to be used until it is cleaned and sanitized and a photo of the cleaned and sanitized machine has been sent to RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025

The prep unit was observed held at 70 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food on top of unit was being held on ice food was in temperature during time of inspection. All food items were moved to working unit to be held. Establishment is not to use unit until repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2025

Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. Establishment filled sanitizer bucket and brought to working kitchen area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025

Wood is used in the construction of the prep unit in the kitchen area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. - CA establishment is to put paper food liner down before constructing sandwich. Until wood is replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2025
The chemical dispensing system for the 3 bay, and cleaning is in poor repair. Establishment must have chemical dispensers services. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the dishwasher have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Establishment is to clean the NFCS of the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2025
